author: chetachiezikeuzor
description: Add a minimal text formatting toolbar for a smoother writing/editing experience.

manifest.author: chetachi
manifest.description: cMenu is a plugin that adds a minimal text editor modal for a smoother writing/editing experience ✍🏽.
manifest.name: cMenu

name: cMenu

releases.author: chetachiezikeuzor
releases.description:
1.1.2 adds [remix icons](https://remixicon.com) for command customization (makes it a bit slow :/), reload function (button to execute and execution after add/delete), custom columns setting, command reordering in settings, command to hide/show cMenu, and [remove tags](https://github.com/chetachiezikeuzor/cMenu-Plugin/pull/23) functionality.

![cMenu 1 1 2](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/79069364/133199928-7de12774-fcb0-48ec-be0e-47ae25b4b4bb.png)
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chetachiezikeuzor/cMenu-Plugin/master/assets/reorder_commands.gif)
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chetachiezikeuzor/cMenu-Plugin/master/assets/hide_show_command.gif)
releases.name: cMenu 1.1.2

releases.author: chetachiezikeuzor
releases.description:
Changed default cMenu commands to match plugin info.

![cMenu 1 1 1](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/79069364/131224181-f6472138-e884-4ec9-aee4-5ceef895005a.png)
releases.name: cMenu 1.1.1

releases.author: chetachiezikeuzor
releases.description:
cMenu 1.1.0 adds a new status bar menu for extra cMenu settings (hide/show buttons, bottom value change) and modifies text editing commands (commands will maintain focus in editor after execution).

![cMenu 1 1 0](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/79069364/131197931-623c17ae-c7af-4546-a1fc-73d062f4cdc9.png)

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chetachiezikeuzor/cMenu-Plugin/master/assets/cMenu%20status%20bar%20menu.gif)
releases.name: cMenu 1.1.0

releases.author: chetachiezikeuzor
releases.description:
Added feather icons to icon chooser

![cMenu 1 0 3](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/79069364/129418975-1df956a5-622e-4a82-af42-2795efdeb164.png)
releases.name: cMenu 1.0.3

releases.author: chetachiezikeuzor
releases.description:
Removed most !importants for better custom styling, added a few more icons, and added updates to UI

![cMenu 1 0 2](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/79069364/129389983-74a7b091-87c7-4e1d-8e64-9c40471eab01.png)
releases.name: cMenu 1.0.2

releases.author: chetachiezikeuzor
releases.description:
cMenu 1.0.1 adds more icons to command icon chooser.

![cMenu 1 0 1](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/79069364/129127723-c3e43162-dd9b-4811-a7a0-8a0cebd79168.png)
releases.name: cMenu 1.0.1

releases.author: chetachiezikeuzor
releases.description:
cMenu 1.0.0 fixes the issue with Sliding Panes with a toggle-able append method setting, adds a new glass morphism setting, and adds a new custom commands setting.

![cMenu 1 0 0](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/79069364/129124435-be120e8e-2bc6-4c7e-967a-915c82e23452.png)
releases.name: cMenu 1.0.0

releases.author: chetachiezikeuzor
releases.description:
Fixed small [bug](https://github.com/chetachiezikeuzor/cMenu-Plugin/issues/3#issuecomment-891371471) that causes an extra resize handle to be created.

![cMenu Demo Header](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/79069364/127948052-064d1058-885b-43a6-8320-c57a21ca3ac6.png)
releases.name: cMenu 0.3.0

releases.author: chetachiezikeuzor
releases.description:
cMenu appends to `.mod-vertical.mod-root` parent instead of `body` parent.

![cMenu Demo Header](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/79069364/127876879-d93d72b9-81b7-4008-adaa-98daf2e9ee29.png)
releases.name: cMenu 0.2.0

releases.author: chetachiezikeuzor
releases.description:
This is a release of cMenu @ v0.1.0. This version cleans up some messy code. 

![cMenu Demo Header](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/79069364/127894978-9dacbe05-c8a3-4275-80d7-5f69b183f736.png)
releases.name: cMenu 0.1.0

releases.description:
